zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏多趋势
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD价格在2119.61附近维持窄幅波动，整体呈现轻微上涨迹象。短期均线SMA(20)位于2117.62下方，价格略高于均线，显示多头仍有一定支撑，但整体动能偏弱，短线可能延续震荡整理格局。

MACD指标显示10.59837的正值，表明多空分歧仍倾向多头，但缺乏Signal线的确认，暗示趋势力度有限。RSI数据缺失，无法判断超买或超卖状态，因此需关注后续动能变化以判断突破方向。

支撑位初步确认在2118.25附近，如跌破该水平可能触发短线回调；阻力位关注2121.26上方，若价格稳步突破，则有望测试2125-2130区域。短线交易者应关注这些关键价位，以便及时调整仓位。

交易建议上，建议偏向低吸高抛策略，逢支撑附近可考虑小仓位买入，逢阻力位可逐步减仓或锁定利润。保持谨慎，等待MACD与价格突破信号同步出现，以提高交易成功率。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently consolidating around the 2119 area, showing an extremely tight intraday range and subdued volatility. Price action remains slightly constructive as it holds just above the 20-period simple moving average near 2117.62. The broader structure reflects a short-term equilibrium between buyers and sellers, with neither side able to establish directional control, suggesting a continuation of range-bound behavior unless a breakout catalyst emerges.

Momentum indicators present a mildly positive but flattening profile. The MACD reading at 10.59837 suggests underlying bullish momentum, though the absence of a signal line makes confirmation limited. Price stability above the SMA(20) reinforces short-term support. However, the narrow trading range indicates declining directional conviction, implying that momentum is transitioning from expansion into consolidation rather than initiating a sustained trend continuation.

Immediate support is clustered around 2117.6–2118.2, aligning with both the SMA(20) and recent session lows, forming a tight defensive floor. A break below this zone could expose downside levels toward 2100. On the upside, resistance is concentrated at 2121.26, the recent high, with a broader barrier near 2130. A sustained break above this range would be required to signal expansion.

Given the current compression in volatility, a range-trading approach is favored in the near term. Long positions may be considered near the 2117 support zone with tight risk control, while partial profit-taking is reasonable into the 2121–2130 resistance band. A decisive breakout above resistance would justify momentum-following longs, whereas a breakdown below support would shift bias toward defensive positioning and capital preservation. Overall
